<Wireframe id="canvas-preview" title="Live use-case canvas" surface="browser">
<div style="display:grid;gap:14px;padding:18px;min-height:320px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--surface),var(--surface-recessed))">
  <header style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;align-items:start">
    <div>
      <p class="wf-muted">Production launch review</p>
      <h2 style="margin:.2rem 0">AI Review Bridge</h2>
    </div>
    <span class="ve-ip-pill">Draft</span>
  </header>
  <main style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:12px">
    <section style="border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:14px;background:var(--surface)">
      <strong>Architecture</strong>
      <p class="wf-muted">Renderer, local bridge, and handoff packet.</p>
    </section>
    <section style="border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:14px;background:var(--surface)">
      <strong>Reviewer state</strong>
      <p class="wf-muted">Answers, checklist, comments, approval.</p>
    </section>
    <section style="border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:14px;background:var(--surface)">
      <strong>Export</strong>
      <p class="wf-muted">Interactive page plus static packet.</p>
    </section>
  </main>
</div>
</Wireframe>
